## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Homebase to discuss content strategy and initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/CretwZGYPuh3H6ex-EUog7qP2zzZTH9V?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Discussed creating lead magnets and calculators using AI/LLMs to drive more conversions](https://fathom.video/share/CretwZGYPuh3H6ex-EUog7qP2zzZTH9V?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Reviewed a proposed list of 1700+ article topic ideas across different content categories](https://fathom.video/share/CretwZGYPuh3H6ex-EUog7qP2zzZTH9V?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
  - [Explored using Airtable to build a comprehensive content database for better organization and insights](https://fathom.video/share/CretwZGYPuh3H6ex-EUog7qP2zzZTH9V?tab=summary&timestamp=2313.0)
  - [Prioritized creating a payroll calculator or schedule maker tool using AI due to high potential impact](https://fathom.video/share/CretwZGYPuh3H6ex-EUog7qP2zzZTH9V?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Lead Generation

  - [Idea to create high-value lead magnets like PDF guides and AI-powered calculators to capture more traffic](https://fathom.video/share/CretwZGYPuh3H6ex-EUog7qP2zzZTH9V?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Potentially embed micro-apps/calculators powered by LLMs into blog content as engaging tools](https://fathom.video/share/CretwZGYPuh3H6ex-EUog7qP2zzZTH9V?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Leverage existing high-ranking content to cross-promote lead magnets and CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/CretwZGYPuh3H6ex-EUog7qP2zzZTH9V?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)

### Proposed Article Topic Ideas

  - [Jimmy shared a draft list of 1700+ article topic ideas across categories like payroll, HR, hiring, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/CretwZGYPuh3H6ex-EUog7qP2zzZTH9V?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [Aim to build Homebase as a go-to resource for small businesses like HubSpot for sales/marketing](https://fathom.video/share/CretwZGYPuh3H6ex-EUog7qP2zzZTH9V?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [Kyle suggested prioritizing payroll and scheduling content aligned with product focus areas](https://fathom.video/share/CretwZGYPuh3H6ex-EUog7qP2zzZTH9V?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)

### Content Database in Airtable

  - [Kerry walked through her Airtable setup to centralize all published content metadata](https://fathom.video/share/CretwZGYPuh3H6ex-EUog7qP2zzZTH9V?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
  - [Allows filtering/sorting by product, funnel stage, need category to identify content gaps](https://fathom.video/share/CretwZGYPuh3H6ex-EUog7qP2zzZTH9V?tab=summary&timestamp=2351.0)
  - [Marcel demonstrated using rollups, formulas, and relational links to automate insights](https://fathom.video/share/CretwZGYPuh3H6ex-EUog7qP2zzZTH9V?tab=summary&timestamp=2338.0)

### Payroll Calculator or Schedule Maker Tool

  - [Prioritizing either a payroll calculator or schedule maker tool leveraging AI/LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/CretwZGYPuh3H6ex-EUog7qP2zzZTH9V?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [Payroll calculator aligns with Homebase's payroll product focus but may be more complex](https://fathom.video/share/CretwZGYPuh3H6ex-EUog7qP2zzZTH9V?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [Schedule maker could leverage existing high rankings but may have lower conversion impact](https://fathom.video/share/CretwZGYPuh3H6ex-EUog7qP2zzZTH9V?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to investigate feasibility of building a payroll calculator by analyzing logic](https://fathom.video/share/CretwZGYPuh3H6ex-EUog7qP2zzZTH9V?tab=summary&timestamp=2265.0)
  - [Kerry to provide inline CTA examples to include across blog content](https://fathom.video/share/CretwZGYPuh3H6ex-EUog7qP2zzZTH9V?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
  - [Explore automating content database updates and deriving insights from Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/CretwZGYPuh3H6ex-EUog7qP2zzZTH9V?tab=summary&timestamp=2338.0)
